title: get health endpoint status check
description: Verify that the GET /health endpoint returns HTTP 200 with database connectivity status, event store status, and core engine availability. This validates the system is operational and all critical dependencies are functioning.

title: get api health endpoint validation
description: Verify that the GET /api/health endpoint (alternative health check) returns HTTP 200 with proper JSON response containing system status indicators.

title: post api orders create order
description: Test that POST /api/orders creates a new order in OPEN state. Verify the order is created with correct initial state, table_id is set, and order_id is returned. This validates the order creation workflow.

title: patch api orders update order items
description: Test that PATCH /api/orders/{orderId} allows adding items to an OPEN order. Verify items are added correctly, order remains in OPEN state, and updates are persisted. This validates order modification before locking.

title: post api orders lock order
description: Test that an order can be locked (OPEN → LOCKED transition). Verify that when order is locked: total is calculated, state changes to LOCKED, and order becomes immutable (no more items can be added). This validates the order finalization process.

title: patch api orders reject modification of locked order
description: Test that PATCH /api/orders/{orderId} rejects modifications to a LOCKED order. Verify that attempting to add items or modify a locked order returns HTTP 400 with appropriate error message. This validates immutability after locking.

title: post api orders close order
description: Test that POST /api/orders/{orderId}/close closes an order (LOCKED → CLOSED transition). Verify order state changes to CLOSED and order becomes fully immutable. This validates order closure workflow.

title: patch api orders reject modification of closed order
description: Test that PATCH /api/orders/{orderId} rejects modifications to a CLOSED order. Verify that attempting to modify a closed order returns HTTP 400. This validates terminal state immutability.

title: order total calculation immutability
description: Test that order total_cents is calculated correctly when order is locked and remains immutable. Verify: total = sum(items.quantity * items.price_snapshot_cents), total does not change after LOCKED, and total is stored correctly. This validates financial immutability guarantee.

title: order state machine transitions
description: Test that order state transitions follow the correct state machine: OPEN → LOCKED → CLOSED. Verify invalid transitions are rejected (e.g., CLOSED → OPEN, LOCKED → OPEN). This validates state machine integrity.
